narrative:
Greensburg Twp. township has 1,010 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.9 percentage points.
